name: Horus IDLE
short_description: Horus IDLE is an IDLE rpg where you see similar scenarios but with a differnt approach. Horus IDLE has only one mission type and one Enemy Type. Horus IDLE was an attempt to pick what I liked from certain games. I also tried to shorten the game a little bit.
detailed_description:
NO OFFLINE PROGRESS!
This game doesnt have an offline progress.... I wanted to implement it really bad....
But I ended up loosing main files.....
The game also doesnt run on Background....


Sorry....

Questions


-Another IDLE RPG?
Yes I love IDLE RPGS, If you look at my most played games I have played a bunch of them.

-Why are you making the same Genre?
I am making the same genre because I want to please my audience.

I am trying to mix things up a little bit this time around...
I tried mixing Mission IDLE and Greed Knights and see If I could get something intresting.
I am pleased with the result.

About this game:


Horus IDLE is an IDLE rpg where you see similar scenarios but with a differnt approach.
Horus IDLE has only one mission type and one Enemy Type.
Horus IDLE was an attempt to pick what I liked from certain games.
I also tried to shorten the game a little bit. So it can be more
welcoming to new players.

Features


  • STATS Allocation
  • Shop
  • Item Upgrades
  • Prestige System
  • Easy to Learn+++
